touching.definition: the event of something coming in contact with the body

watching.definition: the act of observing; taking a patient look

arm.definition: a human limb; technically the part of the superior limb between the shoulder and the elbow but commonly used to refer to the whole superior limb

attention.definition: the process whereby a person concentrates on some features of the environment to the (relative) exclusion of others

touch.definition: the event of something coming in contact with the body
make physical contact with, come in contact with

friend.definition: a person you know well and regard with affection and trust

talking.definition: an exchange of ideas via conversation

sitting.definition: the act of assuming or maintaining a seated position

get.definition: come into the possession of something concrete or abstract

hand.definition: the (prehensile) extremity of the superior limb

wants.definition: the state of needing something that is absent or unavailable
anything that is necessary but lacking

tv.definition: an electronic device that receives television signals and displays them on a screen

child.definition: a young person of either sex

back.definition: the posterior part of a human (or animal) body from the neck to the end of the spine

shoulder.definition: the part of the body between the neck and the upper arm

movie.definition: a form of entertainment that enacts a story by sound and a sequence of images giving the illusion of continuous movement

forearm.definition: the part of the superior limb between the elbow and the wrist

gentle.definition: cause to be more favorably inclined; gain the good will of

finger.definition: any of the terminal members of the hand (sometimes excepting the thumb)

tapping.definition: the sound of light blow or knock

comfort.definition: a state of being relaxed and feeling no pain

comforting.definition: give moral or emotional strength to

day.definition: time for Earth to make a complete rotation on its axis
the time after sunrise and before sunset while it is light outside

way.definition: how something is done or how it happens

conversation.definition: the use of speech for informal exchange of views or ideas or information etc.

sad.definition: experiencing or showing sorrow or unhappiness; ; - Christina Rossetti

work.definition: the occupation for which you are paid

couch.definition: an upholstered seat for more than one person

family.definition: people descended from a common ancestor
a person having kinship with another or others

relaxing.definition: become less tense, rest, or take one's ease

bed.definition: a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

news.definition: information about recent and important events

chilling.definition: the process of becoming cooler; a falling temperature

playing.definition: the action of taking part in a game or sport or other recreation

colleague.definition: an associate that one works with

next.definition: immediately following in time or order

waiting.definition: the act of waiting (remaining inactive in one place while expecting something)

feeling.definition: the experiencing of affective and emotional states

leg.definition: a human limb; commonly used to refer to a whole limb but technically only the part of the limb between the knee and ankle

stranger.definition: anyone who does not belong in the environment in which they are found

face.definition: the front of the human head from the forehead to the chin and ear to ear

talk.definition: an exchange of ideas via conversation

home.definition: where you live at a particular time

poking.definition: a sharp hand gesture (resembling a blow)

situation.definition: the general state of things; the combination of circumstances at a given time; ; ; - Franklin D.Roosevelt

caress.definition: a gentle affectionate stroking (or something resembling it)

upset.definition: an unhappy and worried mental state

cuddling.definition: affectionate play (or foreplay without contact with the genital organs)
move or arrange oneself in a comfortable and cozy position
hold (a person or thing) close, as for affection, comfort, or warmth

mother.definition: a woman who has given birth to a child (also used as a term of address to your mother)

happened.definition: happen, occur, or be the case in the course of events or by chance; ;  (Santayana)

sofa.definition: an upholstered seat for more than one person

life.definition: a characteristic state or mode of living

table.definition: a set of data arranged in rows and columns
a piece of furniture with tableware for a meal laid out on it

show.definition: the act of publicly exhibiting or entertaining

walk.definition: the act of traveling by foot

video.definition: the visible part of a television transmission

take.definition: the income or profit arising from such transactions as the sale of land or other property

member.definition: one of the persons who compose a social group (especially individuals who have joined and participate in a group organization)

pain.definition: a symptom of some physical hurt or disorder
emotional distress; a fundamental feeling that people try to avoid

touched.definition: make physical contact with, come in contact with

skin.definition: a natural protective body covering and site of the sense of touch

patting.definition: pat or squeeze fondly or playfully, especially under the chin

know.definition: the fact of being aware of information that is known to few people
be cognizant or aware of a fact or a specific piece of information; possess knowledge or information about

romantic.definition: expressive of or exciting sexual love or romance

make.definition: make or cause to be or to become

comes.definition: move toward, travel toward something or somebody or approach something or somebody

behind.definition: in or to or toward the rear

rub.definition: the act of rubbing or wiping

lying.definition: the deliberate act of deviating from the truth

checking.definition: examine so as to determine accuracy, quality, or condition

head.definition: the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

massage.definition: kneading and rubbing parts of the body to increase circulation and promote relaxation

catch.definition: the act of catching an object with the hands

phone.definition: electronic equipment that converts sound into electrical signals that can be transmitted over distances and then converts received signals back into sounds

problems.definition: a state of difficulty that needs to be resolved

emotional.definition: determined or actuated by emotion rather than reason

cry.definition: a loud utterance; often in protest or opposition

see.definition: perceive by sight or have the power to perceive by sight

making.definition: make or cause to be or to become

reassured.definition: cause to feel sure; give reassurance to

therapist.definition: a person skilled in a particular type of therapy

stroking.definition: a light touch with the hands
touch lightly and repeatedly, as with brushing motions

another.definition: any of various alternatives; some other

dinner.definition: the main meal of the day served in the evening or at midday

people.definition: (plural) any group of human beings (men or women or children) collectively

wake.definition: be awake, be alert, be there
